titleStmt.title: SII 4.737: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 737. (A.R. Nos. 282 and 284 of 1892). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīsarvvalōkāśraya śrīviṣṇuvarddhanamahārājulu dribhuvanacakravartti
śrīparāṁttakadēvara pravarddhamānavijayarājyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu 5 gu srā
hi sakavarṣaṁbulu 1037 gunēṁṭi manmathasaṁvatsaraṁbuna rājasarvvajñu
ṇḍu jananāthavuraṁbuna rājyābhivarddhanakōṁ sukhaṁbuna rājyaṁbusēyu
cuṇḍitana yanvayakāṁpulainavāri sakalaparamavaṁsōdbhava bhāradvājagōtrakha
ṭvauṁggadhvaja vriṣabhalāṁcchana kāṁccīpuravarē pallavakulati
lakapādāṁbujasēvita Annuvakāmakula nōḍi
vaḍisāhasārjjuna saṁgrāmarāma cālukya
naṁkkakāṟa paramaṇḍalacūṟakāṟa pati jamuṇṭai
na śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalika boddana kallartti
lōkarttipalli yalamiṁda bejavāḍa
. kaṁda . rājēṁdracōḍadēvatanūju narapāla sēkha
runicē rājitayaśubētarāju lupālu
ku bētarājamahēṁdrucēnāpuraṁddara tā
khilakīrtticē bejavāḍaraḍḍikamunu saluvatti
pratipannikalu . va . viseṣapadārtthaṁbu himāspadu
lai maṇḍalika boddaṇṇunuṁ dammu
kaṁbu rājyaṁbusēsi maṇḍalika boddaṇḍu ṭṭikaluṇḍu
vri . Ātani tammuṇḍanvayaviyattalamitruṇḍa sēṣa diktaṭakhyātayaśōrtti bhīma
ṇḍu sukhasthiti rājai yabdhivēṣṭitakṣmātalanāthulellanarigāṁpulamāḍki
na tīṟuveṭṭa māṁdātayayātivēṇunrigadharmmajulaṭlati pragalbhuṁṇḍai
. gī . paramahīśulu bhaktulai baṁppaṁ banulu sēyucuṇḍaṁggaṁdapanu
rasmiyunuṁgāḍpu corccinaccona tanayājñasocci veluṁgu bhūmiyellanu
baṁggena bhīmaṇḍēle . svasti samastabhuvanāsraya rājādhirāja rājaparamē
svara paramabhaṭṭāraka ravikulatilaka satyāśrayavaṁsya cālukyābharaṇa
śrītribhuvanacakravartti śrīmatpermmanaḍi dēvara divyasahasravarṣa
ṁbulu 46 gu śrāhi śrīveṁgidēśa cālukya kakāṟaparama
ṇḍalacūṟakāṟa vatidēvagurudvijabhaktulaina kuṟumaṟaja
muṇḍaina mahāmaṇṇalika bhīma laku meccibejavāḍa
raḍḍi kaṁbu dayasēsina . vritta . raṁbulu rasōdadhi
vāyupathēṁdusaṁkhyagā nbeja
vāḍaraḍḍikaṁ baripurabhēdirāja paramātmunicēṁ baḍasenravīṁdulu
nudharaṇiyunaṁburāsulu sadāgatimārggamugallu naṁttakunu .
Digital edition of SII 4.737 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
